# text / filter

The **text** type's `data-view.filter` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.Filter({ match: "text", ... })` — a single substring
`Control` plus the pure `predicate` / `isActive` (case-insensitive contains)
applied in the data-view row pipeline. Derived text types (e.g.
`multiline-text`) reuse this filter via the `extends`-chain fallback.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Text field type: data-view filter operator set (contains / is / is-empty …).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.Filter` "text"
  - Uses: `primitives/data-view.DataViewSlots`, `primitives/data-view.FilterValueInput`, `primitives/data-view.FilterValueInputProps`
